Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Melbostad for Jay Cowan, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Melbostad reported that that a petition for final distribution has been prepared but has not yet been filed because the waiver of accounting from Otis's father, Per Damslet, has not been received. Mr. Melbostad stated that he had an email exchange with Otis's sister, who confirmed that she would assist their father in signing and returning the waiver. Mr. Melbostad requested a one-month continuance to allow time to receive the waiver, file the petition, and have courtesy copies delivered to the court.

The court continued the matter to April 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Paul Melbostad, Esq., for Jay Cowan, Executor.

At the court's query, Counsel offers an update as to the status of the Estate and requests a continuance to prepare and file a Petition for Final Distribution.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Mar-11-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Jan-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Melbostad for Jay Cowan, Executor (via Zoom).

The court reviewed Mr. Melbostad's explanation for his previous absence and took the order to appear off calendar and decided not to impose sanctions.

Counsel informed the court that the estate recently received an award from the Victim Compensation Fund on 11/13/2024 totaling $251,320, and that the award was submitted to the probate referee for inventory and appraisal. A waiver off accounting was sent to decedent's father, who recently relocated from Norway to Portugal, causing delays in its return. However, the father has verbally agreed to the waiver.

The court continued the status on the close of estate to January 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and instructed counsel to submit the necessary filings prior to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. At the initial calling of this matter, a person from Mr. Melbostad's office advised via Zoom that Mr. Melbostad was delayed and asked that the matter be passed. The court recalled the matter at approximately 9:22 a.m. The court, unsuccessfully, attempted to gain Mr. Melbostad's attention several times. The court then took the subject matter off calendar. A Status Hearing on the filing of a new petition for final distribution or a new petition for approval of status report is set for Nov-27-2024. An Order to Appear will be issued to attorney Paul Melbostad to appear on Nov-27-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Espin. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Sep-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad, Esq., via Zoom, for Jay Cowan, Executor.

Mr. Melbostad offers an update on this estate and why the closing has been delayed. The court requests that the preceding be formally filed in a petition to approve status.

The subject matter is continued to Sep-11-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melobostad, via Zoom, for Jay G. Cowan, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that the decedent's sister Camille Damsleth is not a citizen of the United Kingdom, and that Jay Cowan and Eric Durr are not biologically related to the decedent. The court waives notice defects in open court and asks if there are any appearances to object to the petition being granted by the court. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-10-2018 is admitted to probate. Jay G. Cowan is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-26-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
